headline: Chief Revenue Officer @ MOP
summary:
With a large experience in media business I was Deputy General Manager for over than 7 years in an international company and I am leading the sales and marketing  on JCDecaux with over than 20 people. 
Leading the business digital transformation with continuous growth with motivated teams is my challenge as I believe that sucess factors are leadership and business intelligence.

experiences.title: Managing Partner
experiences.description:
YouthtTribe is a brand focused on new GenZ and Young Millennials communication. In a partnership with Unimidia we guarantee the biggest Digital OOH within universities and the highest influence social network  to talk with this community. 
Understanding this younger group needs, behaviour and life style is our aim to guarantee that our products are relevants and engage with this Digital Natives and Influencers.

experiences.title: Invited Lecteur
experiences.description: In Account Management unity we prepare students to client management in Advertising and Commercial Business. Allerting for crutial roles and developing intelectual and soft skills are the aim of this curricular unity in order to guarantee that these students will enter on companies aware of the key points to manage client/account.

experiences.title: Sales And Marketing Director
experiences.description:
Leading a team of 25+ I am responsible for driving JCD Portugal to the number one OOH advertising guaranteeing strong sales results within all areas: Traditional, Digital and Costumer Experience.
A data driven orientation focused on costumer and target needs assures the best products for our clients. Key skills & competences are crucial to guarantee that JCD Portugal is the leader OOH advertising company during the last decade even with 2 crises:
Clear Sales Strategy definition and Product Development always adapted to clients needs.
Guarantee a constant client service in all commercial areas.
Flexible and consistent negotiation strategies and price policies.
Team leadership oriented to results and client service.
Clear KPI's definitions and objective to sales team and continuous updated and control results.
Continuously creative thinking to develop the best solutions to guarantee costumer experience and impact on brands communication.
On marketing focus on Digital Transformation through:
1 - Development of Inbound marketing platform to guarantee sales optimization through eCommerce and retargetting campaigns.
2 - Launch of social media, site and internal communication platform 
3 - Content development for intern and extern targets
4 - Launch of CRM, analytics definitons and KPI's control 
5 - Launch of audience system measurement for Portugal using an unique mobile trecking system.
6 - Continuous data analysis on consumer behaviour and market trends

experiences.company: Restart - Instituto de Criatividade Artes e Novas Tecnologias
experiences.title: Formador
experiences.description: Formador no módulo de Planeamento de Meios

experiences.title: Deputy Managing Director
experiences.description:
Leading a 20+ team and a company with a 50M€ volume I was responsible for:
1: Preparing, implement and control the business plans.
2:  Developing company and executing the agency strategies.
3: Provide Strategic Advice to the OmincomMedia group board.
4: Local and International Client and Business Reporting.
5: Build commercial partnerships with media owners and clients.
6: Guarantees that all the agency worked as a team to produces results to clients.
7: Develop creative ideas to guarantees agency profitability and clients retention.
8: Local and International Client and Business Reporting.

Billings monitoring
Profitability results per client
Suppliers negociations

recommendations:
Francisco Bobone

Vera is one of the most talented professional in both fully understanding clients and consumers. She never stops in the obvious answer. She always finds a better alternative using all the analytics and customer data that she can get. Besides being an absolute pleasure to work with, as a client, I always felt that our discussions where highly enriched by her knowledge and expertise. A True marketeer and a "go-getter" spirit ads value to any brand that she partners with.
